label: Per-Character Identity LoRA (Flux) — TEMPLATE
intended_use: Template for per-named-character identity LoRAs trained against FLUX.1-dev. Each concrete character (Kael Maren, Renna Vasik, Jace Delvari, ...) gets its own cloned instance with a unique trigger_override (e.g. sf_kael_maren). Stacks at inference with the character-domain World LoRA (character-style-lora-flux). See two-LoRA stack contract in the handbook and memory/two-lora-stack-research-2026-04-23.md for the full architecture. This file validates as a template; concrete instances derive from it by setting trigger_override and narrowing subject_requirements to the single target subject.
